creator: rob@acasta.co.uk
text:
Acasta Ltd is a fully independent Information Assurance and Cyber Security consultancy based in the North of England. We have been helping UK Government, Finance, Healthcare, and, Law Enforcement organisations secure their business information systems since 2008.  We offer technical compliance studies, management and execution of solution designs, Network/Server infrastructure design; Web Security solutions, and many other technical design services.

http://www.acasta.co.uk
